HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

34class Dipole : public IncidentField {
35 private:
36 // --- Physical dipole parameters ---
37 cvec p;
38 rvec r0;
39 dcmplx omega;
40
41 // --- Background medium (homogeneous) ---
42 GreenF* grnFun;
43 dcmplx muMedium;
44
45 // --- Tabulation data (layered) ---
46 std::vector<Grid> tabulationGrids;
47 std::vector<Grid> tabulationGridsFields;
48
49 // --- Layered‑medium state ---
50 GreenF *grnFunLayered;
51 GreenF *grnFunLayeredFields;
52 LayeredMediaUtils* layeredUtils;
53
54 public:
55 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
56 // Construction
57 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
68 Dipole(rvec location, cvec polarization, dcmplx vacuumWavelength,
69 dcmplx muMedium, GreenF* fHom);
70
82 Dipole(rvec location, cvec polarization, dcmplx vacuumWavelength,
83 GreenF* fHom, dcmplx muMedium, std::vector<Grid> tabGrids,
84 GreenF* fLayered, LayeredMediaUtils* utils);
85
86 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
87 // Pointwise field evaluation
88 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
94 cvec EvaluateE(rvec position);
95
101 cvec EvaluateH(rvec position);
102
111 std::vector<cvec> EvaluateLayeredEandH(rvec position);
112
113 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
114 // RWG integrations (MoM right‑hand‑sides)
115 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
121 dcmplx IntegrateE(RWGFun* f);
122
128 dcmplx IntegrateH(RWGFun* f);
129
135 std::vector<dcmplx> IntegrateLayeredEandH(RWGFun* f);
136
137 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
138 // Accessors
139 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
143 cvec Polarization();
144
148 rvec Location();
149
150 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
151 // Type traits (for polymorphic #IncidentField handling)
152 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
153 bool IsPlaneWave() { return false; }
154 bool IsDipole() { return true; }
155 bool IsGaussian() { return false; }
156
157 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158 // Layered‑media configuration
159 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
166 virtual void setGrnFunLayered(GreenF *fGrnFields, std::vector<Grid> tabGrids);
167};
